---
title: "Modelling"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

```{r}
# Libraries
library(rminer)
```

```{r}
# Get Data
baltimore_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_uni.rds")
baltimore_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_multi.rds")

lancaster_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_uni.rds")
lancaster_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_multi.rds")

philadelphia_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_uni.rds")
philadelphia_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_multi.rds")

richmond_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_uni.rds")
richmond_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_multi.rds")
```
